channel.title: Docker Escape on 4wayhandshake
channel.description: Recent content in Docker Escape on 4wayhandshake

item.title: Analytics
item.description: INTRODUCTION At the time of writing this walkthrough, Analytics is still active. The box centers around a fictional analytics company that provides data analysis services using the infrastructure they’re hosting. The company is running a popular open-source analytics / BI platform. This box uses a modern architecture, reflective of how real websites run these days (when they’re on-prem). For each step of Analytics, the skill emphasis is placed firmly on enumeration.

item.title: Cybermonday
item.description: INTRODUCTION At the time of writing this walkthrough, Cybermondaywas just released! It is the ninth box for HTB’s Hackers Clash: Open Beta Season II. The site is a fictional e-commerce site. This box will test your knowledge of SQL, broken authentication, and definitely all the JWT tricks you can imagine! Have fun. RECON nmap scans For this box, I’m running the same enumeration strategy as the previous boxes in the Open Beta Season II.
